_comment: Locally authored concern records for Dr Galina's concern-category taxonomy (July 2026). conditions.json mirrors the live public API and must stay untouched — these records are merged in on top by src/lib/data.ts. Same record shape as the API; treatment strings follow the 'Name - £price' convention so they parse and cross-link like the rest.

conditions.title: Hooded Upper Eyelids
conditions.description: Non-surgical lifting for heavy upper lids that make eyes look smaller and more tired than you feel

conditions.title: Collagen Depletion
conditions.description: Rebuild firmness and bounce as natural collagen production slows, using biostimulating treatments

conditions.title: Facial Ageing After Rapid Weight Loss
conditions.description: Restore volume and firmness lost through rapid or GLP-1-assisted weight loss

conditions.title: Upper-Face Wrinkles
conditions.description: Soften forehead lines, frown lines and crow's feet while keeping natural expression

conditions.title: Accordion Lines
conditions.description: Smooth the vertical cheek lines that concertina when you smile

conditions.title: Post-Inflammatory Pigmentation
conditions.description: Fade the dark marks left behind by acne, breakouts and skin trauma

conditions.title: Sensitive Skin
conditions.description: Calm reactive, easily irritated skin with a gentle, medically guided plan

conditions.title: Loose Skin Around the Knees
conditions.description: Tighten crepey, lax skin around the knees, often following rapid weight loss

conditions.title: Loose Abdominal Skin
conditions.description: Firm loose abdominal skin left behind after rapid or GLP-1-assisted weight loss

conditions.title: Early Signs of Ageing
conditions.description: Preventative, low-intervention treatments that protect skin quality before lines and laxity set in
